pat.tit: INTEGRATED WIRELESS SENSOR NETWORK (WSN) AND MASSIVELY PARALLEL PROCESSING DATABASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM (MPP DBMS)
pat.res: THIS INVENTION DESCRIBES AN ARCHITECTURE AND A PROCESS FOR MANAGING SENSOR DATA WHOSE MAIN GOAL IS TO IMPROVE THE QUALITY OF INFORMATION PROVIDED TO THE APPLICATION WHILE OPTIMIZING THE USE OF THE AVAILABLE SENSING AND COMMUNICATION RESOURCES. TO ACHIEVE THIS GOAL, OUR APPROACH CONSISTS IN ADOPTING A DATA-CENTRIC ARCHITECTURE BASED ON THE PRINCIPLES OF AUTONOMIC COMPUTING TO INTEGRATE SENSORY DATA ACQUISITION SYSTEMS WITH A MASSIVELY PARALLEL PROCESSING DATABASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM (MPP DBMS) AND A SET OF PREDICTION MODELS. THE ORIGINALITY OF THIS WORK CONSISTS IN THE FOLLOWING ASPECTS: (I)…
pat.inst: UNITED STATES PATENT AND TRADEMARK OFFICE
